sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 3 Unique Perks of the Amex Business Platinum Card
feed.summary: The article highlights three unique perks of the Amex Business Platinum Card: earning 2X points on purchases of $5,000 or more, receiving up to $360 back annually for hiring with Indeed, and a 35% airline bonus when using Pay with Points for flights. While the card has a high annual fee of $895, the author suggests that the extensive benefits and credits can provide over $3,500 in value, making it worthwhile for businesses that can fully utilize its offerings. The piece also details the card's welcome offer of 200,000 Membership Rewards points for eligible spending.
